Our Story

Mumbles'
Finest Since
1939

Nestled in the heart of Mumbles village, Johnnies has been serving the community for generations. From the golden batter on our large cod to the thick-cut chips fresh from the fryer — quality has never wavered.

We use the finest fresh fish, battered and cooked to order every time. Whether you're a local regular or visiting the Gower coast for the first time, Johnnies is a Mumbles must.

85+Years Open
4.6★Rated
4715-Star Reviews
